title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Lifestyle Advisory Limited

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Store Manager at Lifestyle Advisory Limited
jsonLd.description:
Lifestyle Advisory Limited invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Store Manager at our Rajkot location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Lifestyle Advisory Limited:
Lifestyle Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning
• Ensure visual merchandising standards are maintained at all times
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Category Management
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Loss Prevention
• Proficiency in Shrinkage Control
• Proficiency in Loyalty Programs

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Annual performance appraisal
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Lifestyle Advisory Limited!
